notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the python3.9 SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.6. It addresses 8 CVEs: CVE-2025-12084, CVE-2024-5642, CVE-2025-6075, CVE-2025-4516, CVE-2026-1299, and 3 more.
